title: Atom
description: A modding library with beautiful VFX, new capability system
body:
# Creating mods never been so easy. 

## **What is Atom?**

**Atom** - powerful **modding library**. You can easily create animated VFX effects using particles, configuration files for your mod and other things.

## **Features**:
- Create powerful animated VFX effects with particles
- Easily create items and add them to tab
- Create configuration files for mod easily
- Easily create capabilities
- Interpolation
- Create network packets easily
- Add particles easily
